mapper.insert: insert into room( roomname, roomid, onerid, status, time) values (#{roomname}, #{roomid}, #{onerid}, #{status}, #{time})
mapper.select: select roomname, roomid, onerid, status, time from room where status != -1 and onerid = #{onerid}
select count(*) from room where status != -1 and onerid = #{onerid}
select r.roomname, r.roomid, r.onerid, r.status, r.time from room r join roommate rm on r.roomid = rm.roomid where rm.memberid = #{memberid} and r.status != -1
select count(*) from room r join roommate rm on r.roomid = rm.roomid where rm.memberid = #{memberid} and r.status != -1

select r.roomname, r.roomid, r.onerid, r.status, r.time from room r join roommate rm on r.roomid = rm.roomid where rm.memberid = #{memberid} and r.status != -1 order by r.time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select roompassword from room where status != -1 and roomname = #{roomname}
